episodes.title: Grief, But Keep It Moving
episodes.description: A very Friday episode. We’re talking trash TV (including Trust Me on Netflix), cult documentaries, life feeling like it’s either falling apart or falling into place (who knows), and how to remind yourself you’re still doing okay in the middle of it. Also… a childhood story that truly didn’t need to happen to me, but did. New episodes every Wednesday and Friday.Follow along on IG & TikTok: @mytherapistsaidpod 💚🎧
